'''竏嗹-zh-s-l''' ('''kawazhseloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:annualize|annualize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-zh-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:annualize|annualize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗹-zh-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawazhseloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazhseloko|thiwazhseloko]] || [[word:jiwazhseloko|jiwazhseloko]] || [[word:shiwazhseloko|shiwazhseloko]] || [[word:kiwazhseloko|kiwazhseloko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
